label: International Transportation and Infrastructure Safety Incidents

timeline.event: Construction Vehicle Falls Into Taipei River
timeline.description: A major accident at a Taipei construction site left one worker critical after a vehicle plunged into a river near the Minquan Bridge.

timeline.event: India Grounds Indigenous Tejas Fighter Fleet
timeline.description: Following a third major accident, India grounded its fleet of Tejas Light Combat Aircraft, forcing them to miss a major firepower demonstration.

timeline.event: VSR Ventures Aircraft Grounded in India Over Safety
timeline.description: India's aviation regulator grounded four aircraft operated by VSR Ventures due to safety violations following a fatal crash earlier in the year.

timeline.event: Oman Reports 13% Jump in Serious Traffic Accidents
timeline.description: Oman witnessed a significant 13% surge in major traffic accidents, leading to over 77,000 insurance claims and rising medical expenses.

timeline.event: Fires Disrupt Lagos and Cape Town Airport Operations
timeline.description: Unrelated fires on the same day caused operational disruptions at both the Lagos departures hall and Cape Town International Airport's IT systems.
